summary: A WCVB Channel 5 / CityLine television clip of ICE Acting Director Todd Lyons speaking at a podium in front of a U.S. flag and DOJ seal about sanctuary cities turning over criminal aliens. This is a recorded news/press-conference segment, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: TODD LYONS ACTING DIRECTOR, ICE; CITYLINE; WCVB 5 ABC
